name: Scheiterhaufen (Log Pyre)
recipeIngredient: 6 Sliced rolls or an equivalent amount of sliced White (French) bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the milk, eggs, cinnamon, and sugar in a bowl until smooth.
2. Cut the rolls into quarter-inch thick slices.
3. Dip each slice into the milk mixture.
4. Arrange the slices in layers in a buttered baking dish, scattering raisins and sultanas between each layer.
5. Drizzle any leftover liquid over the sliced rolls.
6. Dot the top with small dabs of butter.
7. Cover the top of the dish with aluminum foil to prevent drying out.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for about 30 minutes.
Serves 4.
